# spawn_agent [DECLARED — not ported]

## Status

Declared — methodology surface only; no Go command exists for it yet. The name below is historical (pre-port Python methodology); invoking it as `hotam <name>` will fail with "unknown command".

Not ported. Historically: composes a sub-agent's task prompt by prepending the agent's CLAUDE.md crystal, so the subagent boots from substrate (not from raw text).
